description: Implement the organizational changes detailed in the restructuring memo (~/Desktop/restructuring_memo.txt) within Sentrifugo HRMS. Reassign the reporting managers for EMP007, EMP009, EMP011, and EMP014; transfer EMP010 and EMP016 to their new departments; and create the 'Team Lead' job title, assigning it to EMP017. Ensure all updates are active in the system.
